category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Mongolia.

target_market_label.zh: 蒙古（MASM / 国家调度中心）
target_market_label.zht: 蒙古（MASM / 國家調度中心）

title.en: China-to-Mongolia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入蒙古：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入蒙古：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Mongolia MASM conformity certification and NDC / ERC grid-coordination requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, extreme cold-climate enclosure and cable requirements (operating to −40 °C), OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Includes an honest assessment of GB/T connector physical incompatibility with IEC 62196 infrastructure and the cold-climate operating-temperature gate unique to Mongolia.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与蒙古MASM合格认证及NDC / ERC电网协调要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、极寒气候外壳及电缆要求（工作温度至−40°C）、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。包含对GB/T接口与IEC 62196基础设施物理不兼容性，及蒙古特有极寒工作温度门槛的客观评估。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與蒙古MASM合格認證及NDC / ERC電網協調要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、極寒氣候外殼及電纜要求（工作溫度至−40°C）、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。包含對GB/T接口與IEC 62196基礎設施物理不兼容性，及蒙古特有極寒工作溫度門檻的客觀評估。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Mongolia, the confirmed practical gaps are: MASM conformity certification under MNS national standards (GOST/IEC-influenced) coordinated with NDC and ERC; connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC) since Mongolia's IEC-aligned infrastructure is physically incompatible with GB/T connectors; extreme cold-climate operating-temperature rating to at least −40 °C covering power electronics, cable flexibility, enclosure sealing, and battery-management thermal cutoffs; IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 safety evidence with cold-climate derating; EMC evidence per IEC 61000; and OCPP back-office interoperability for networked chargers. Mongolia's grid is 220/380 V 50 Hz, which aligns with China's domestic baseline, reducing the voltage-gap risk compared to Qatar; however, thermal design for −40 °C extreme cold is a harder engineering gate than Qatar's heat rating. A blanket single mandatory whole-unit EVSE certification rule through MASM could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current MASM conformity assessment route, HS code, charger type, and NDC grid-coordination path before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入蒙古时，已确认的实务差距包括：须在国家调度中心（NDC）和能源监管委员会（ERC）协调下取得MASM国家标准（受GOST/IEC影响）合格认证；由于蒙古IEC体系基础设施在物理上与GB/T接口不兼容，须将接口从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/CCS2（直流）；须满足至少−40°C的极寒气候工作温度额定要求，覆盖电力电子、电缆柔韧性、外壳密封和电池管理热截止；须提供含极寒降额的IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23安全证据；须提供符合IEC 61000的EMC证据；联网充电桩须满足OCPP后台互操作要求。蒙古电网为220/380 V 50 Hz，与中国国内基线一致，相较卡塔尔可降低电压差距风险；但−40°C极寒热设计要求比卡塔尔高温额定在工程层面更具挑战性。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认适用于所有EVSE整机的蒙古MASM强制认证规则，出口商应在出货前核实当前MASM合格评定路径、HS编码、充电桩类型和NDC并网协调路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入蒙古時，已確認的實務差距包括：須在國家調度中心（NDC）和能源監管委員會（ERC）協調下取得MASM國家標準（受GOST/IEC影響）合格認證；由於蒙古IEC體系基礎設施在物理上與GB/T接口不兼容，須將接口從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/CCS2（直流）；須滿足至少−40°C的極寒氣候工作溫度額定要求，覆蓋電力電子、電纜柔韌性、外殼密封和電池管理熱截止；須提供含極寒降額的IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23安全證據；須提供符合IEC 61000的EMC證據；聯網充電樁須滿足OCPP後台互操作要求。蒙古電網為220/380 V 50 Hz，與中國國內基線一致，相較卡塔爾可降低電壓差距風險；但−40°C極寒熱設計要求比卡塔爾高溫額定在工程層面更具挑戰性。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認適用於所有EVSE整機的蒙古MASM強制認證規則，出口商應在出貨前核實當前MASM合格評定路徑、HS編碼、充電樁類型和NDC併網協調路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MASM scope determination, NDC or ERC approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Mongolia conformity assessment rules, NDC grid-coordination requirements, IEC standard editions, cold-climate installation rules, and applicable MNS standards with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MASM适用范围裁定、国家调度中心或能源监管委员会批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行蒙古合格评定规则、NDC并网协调要求、IEC标准版本、极寒气候安装规则及适用的MNS标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MASM適用範圍裁定、國家調度中心或能源監管委員會批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行蒙古合格評定規則、NDC併網協調要求、IEC標準版本、極寒氣候安裝規則及適用的MNS標準。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
